title: Generating Pascal's Triangle
scenario: Write a recursive Java function that generates Pascal's Triangle up to a specified number of rows. The function should accept the row count as an integer input and return a 2D array representing the triangle. The output should be a code snippet, formatted according to standard Java conventions.
constraints: Must handle edge cases for row counts 0 and 1

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the Java code snippet is syntactically correct, following standard Java conventions.
Check whether the generated code meets the specified constraints (recursive approach and edge case handling).
Evaluate the correctness of the generated code, ensuring it accurately produces Pascal's Triangle for specified row counts.
Assess the code's readability and maintainability, considering comment quality, variable naming, and overall structure.
